name: The Glowing Crater
description: A massive impact crater filled with radioactive waste. Extremely dangerous but loaded with pre-war tech.

name: Abandoned Supermart
description: A gutted superstore on the edge of the old city. Raiders patrol the parking lot.

name: Mutant Farmlands
description: Overgrown fields outside the city. Mostly harmless mutant animals roam here.

name: Sunken Highway
description: A collapsed overpass buried under rubble. Flooded tunnels hide pre-war vehicles.

name: Vault 77 Entrance
description: The sealed blast door of an old Vault-Tec bunker. Nobody has gotten inside. Yet.
